_about: Autoload string bank copied to RAM 0x02328720 at boot (3rd autoload payload). Relocated UI/name/summary strings; only offsets below 0x40E0 are heap-safe and actively referenced - higher offsets are retired relocation data kept byte-exact. Entries: offset(relative), decoded text, canonical payload; gaps between entries are zero bytes. Leading 0x01 bytes in a payload are alignment pad.
